name: Julie's Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into small cubes.
2. In a small bowl, combine soy sauce, mustard, and meat cubes. Set aside.
3. Halve the cherry tomatoes and slice the other vegetables.
4. Cook onions and carrots in 1/2 tablespoon oil until tender.
5. Set aside.
6. Cook zucchini in 1/2 tablespoon oil for 30 seconds, then add mushrooms for 30 seconds. Remove and set aside.
7. Stir-fry meat in 1/2 tablespoon oil for 2 to 3 minutes.
8. Add the vegetables and tomatoes to the meat.
9. Serve over cooked noodles or ramen noodles.
